Off Calendar Dec-27-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling -
DEFENDANT ANON EVENTS, INC. Motion To Amend Defendant Anon Events Incorporated's Answer To Plaintiff'S Complaint - The motion to amend the answer to make the name change is granted. The Court also gives plaintiff leave to amend to add Anon Events aka Joegh Bullock as Doe One. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Marla Miller, Reporter: La Vena Ward, CSR # 7077 =(302/MJM)
